title: DecisionTrace.decisions — autonomous decision entry shape
description: JSON Schema for a single element in the DecisionTrace.decisions JSONB array (src/shared/infrastructure/database/models/decision_traces.py). Each entry corresponds to one Decision dataclass instance (src/will/orchestration/decision_tracer.py) serialized via dataclasses.asdict(). The decisions column stores the complete session decision chain for autonomous operation observability, consumed by core-admin inspect decisions. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 (persistence boundary). This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this decision was made. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS or similar datetime string.

agent.description: Name of the autonomous agent that made this decision (e.g. CodeGenerator, Planner, IterativeCoderAgent).

decision_type.description: Classification of the decision kind. Used by pattern analysis to group decisions by type across sessions.

context.description: Contextual inputs available at decision time. Shape is decision_type-specific; ungoverned beyond dict[str, Any].

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this decision was made. Core observability field for autonomous operation review.

chosen_action.description: The action selected at this decision point.

alternatives_considered.description: Other actions that were considered but not chosen. Used for option-diversity analysis.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the chosen action, in [0.0, 1.0].
